skill: Linear inequalities in one or two variables
stem:
y > 9
3x + y < 20

The point (x, 22) is a solution to the system of inequalities in the xy-plane. Which of the following could be the value of x?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. Since y = 22, the first inequality 22 > 9 is satisfied. The second gives 3x + 22 < 20, so 3x < −2 and x < −2/3. Of the options, only −3 satisfies x < −2/3.

Choices A, B, and C give values of x greater than −2/3, so 3x + 22 would not be less than 20.
